name: io.github.Qiskit/qiskit-docs-mcp-server
title: Qiskit Documentation MCP Server
description: MCP server for querying and retrieving Qiskit documentation, guides, and API references

environmentVariables.name: QISKIT_DOCS_CACHE_MAXSIZE
environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of in-memory cache entries

environmentVariables.name: QISKIT_DOCS_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for persistent cache files (empty = memory-only)

environmentVariables.name: QISKIT_DOCS_OFFLINE
environmentVariables.description: Disable network requests; serve only from cache (1/true/yes to enable)
